title: FotisGk/Gkountromichos_et_al_2026: Reproducible analysis scripts for Gkountromichos et al. 2026
author: Fotios Gkountromichos
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
This release contains the analysis scripts used in: 
 Gkountromichos et al. (2026) "Dosage compensation defects due to roX RNA loss are rescued by recalibration of X/autosome stoichiometry." 
 This repository provides reproducible computational workflows and analysis scripts supporting the study's main and supplementary results, including genomics/statistical analyses and figure-generation pipelines. 
 Contents
R scripts: statistical analysis, genomics integration, plotting, and result summarization
Shell scripts: pipeline orchestration and preprocessing steps
ImageJ macros: image quantification/processing routines used in the study 
 Reproducibility notes
This release is a versioned snapshot of the code used for the manuscript.
Input data dependencies and expected file structures are documented in the repository.
Package/software versions are recorded in the Materials and Methods section of the manuscript. 
 Citation
If you use this code, please cite the manuscript.
